faq.label: — Frequently Asked Questions
faq.intro: A question not listed here? I personally reply to every message within 24h.

items.q: Do you help with ideas and concept?
items.a: Yes. We guide our clients through creative direction, storytelling and content strategy.

Yes. We offer monthly collaborations for brands, businesses and entrepreneurs looking to build a consistent and professional social media presence.

These collaborations allow us to create regular, cohesive and optimized content to strengthen your brand image over the long term.
Yes, I'm available for projects anywhere in Quebec, Canada and internationally. Travel costs (transport, accommodation) are calculated at actual cost and included in the final quote.

items.q: Can I see your work before deciding?
items.a: Absolutely. My portfolio is available on this site and on Instagram (@massishoots). I also offer a free 30-minute discovery call to discuss your project and show you examples similar to your brief.
Retouched photos are delivered within 7 to 10 business days. Edited videos take 2 to 3 weeks depending on complexity. A preview is often available sooner for urgent events.
A 50% deposit is required upon signing the contract to confirm your booking. The balance is settled upon final delivery of the content. I accept bank transfer, credit card and e-Transfer.
The deposit is non-refundable for cancellations less than 14 days out. For early cancellations, I generally offer a free date change. Life happens — I always adapt with flexibility and respect.

Yes. MassiShoots integrates modern AI tools to enhance transitions, visual effects and certain creative animations to bring a more modern and immersive touch to content.

However, all main editing, color grading and artistic direction are done manually using professional software like Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve and After Effects.

Our goal is to maintain a high-end, cinematic and authentic result.

cta.label: — Ready to level up?
cta.subtext: Every day without premium content is a day your competition gains ground. Let's create something exceptional together.
cta.footnote: Available for travel · Response within 24h · First call free

footer.tagline: Cinematic photo & video for brands and entrepreneurs in Montreal.

about.label: — About
about.para1: Passionate about visual storytelling, Massi Bena transforms every project into cinematic content that leaves a lasting impression. Based in Montreal, he collaborates with entrepreneurs, businesses and couples to create images that make an impact.
about.para2: His approach: rigorous artistic direction, mastered technique, and a human sensitivity that shines through every image.
